zh.key_metrics: 主表（Qwen-3.5-4B 骨干，TID，full-item ranking）：Sports R@5 IIRG=0.0406 vs Naive 0.0337（+20.5%）；Toys R@5=0.0780 vs 0.0634（+23%）；Beauty R@5=0.0726 vs 0.0606（+19.8%）。相对仅 next-item 的 Naive 平均 +21% Recall@5，且在全部 3 数据集 ×4 指标上优于全部 17 基线。分组增益：非记忆受益用户 +40% vs 记忆受益用户 +16%。

en.method_overview: The paper studies one-hop memorization in LLM-based generative recommendation, where the model memorizes consecutive item transitions and recommends memorized successors. LLMs rely on this more than non-LLM TIGER, and their gains concentrate on users whose targets are covered by such transitions. They propose IIRG, which jointly trains the LLM on next-item prediction plus collaborative-neighbor generation (multi-hop co-occurrence) and semantic-neighbor generation (text similarity), teaching richer item-item relations beyond one-hop transitions.
en.innovation: First to quantify one-hop memorization in LLM-GR (not explained by scale or overfitting) and to propose an identifier-agnostic, plug-and-play multi-task training (IIRG) that supervises multi-hop collaborative and semantic item-item relations.
en.key_metrics: Qwen-3.5-4B/TID full-item ranking: Sports R@5 0.0406 vs Naive 0.0337 (+20.5%); Toys 0.0780 vs 0.0634 (+23%); Beauty 0.0726 vs 0.0606 (+19.8%); ~+21% avg Recall@5 over Naive and best across 3 datasets x 4 metrics vs 17 baselines. Group split: +40% (non-memorization users) vs +16% (memorization users).

title: Do Generative Recommenders Deepen the Information Cocoon? A Closed-Loop Simulation with LLM-powered User Simulators

score.rationale_zh: 选题与电商内容多样性治理高度契合（曝光多样性、长尾/头部集中、创作者公平），首次用 LLM-agent 闭环仿真系统比较生成式 vs 传统推荐的信息茧房，并原创 code 空间结构茧房指标；但属诊断/分析型、缺准确率 SOTA 与真实用户校准，泛化范围有限。

zh.method_overview: 作者构建 RecLoop——一个由 LLM 用户智能体（Qwen3-8B）驱动的大规模闭环仿真框架，让推荐器经历‘曝光→用户选择→数据更新→周期重训’共 15 个循环（Office 5K agents、Toys 20K agents）。每个 agent 含动态画像、长短期双记忆、周期反思与动作模块，既保留历史偏好又随交互演化。除曝光层指标（类目熵、Jaccard、覆盖率、Gini），还原创提出 Code-Space Structural Cocoon（分层 code 熵 + Top-κ 集中度），刻画生成式推荐内部 code 空间的收窄。
zh.story: 现有信息茧房研究只针对传统 ID 序列推荐、且依赖静态离线评估，无法刻画生成式推荐在长期反馈循环中的茧房演化 → 设计 LLM-agent 闭环仿真 RecLoop + 新增 code 空间结构茧房指标来填补该空白。
zh.innovation: 1）首个面向生成式推荐信息茧房的 LLM-agent 闭环仿真框架（含周期重训）；2）原创‘Code-Space Structural Cocoon’模型级指标，从学习到的离散 code 层级衡量收窄；3）系统性结论：生成式更抗曝光层茧房；茧房集中在粗粒度 code 层；CID 比 SID 更易加剧；更大模型更抗茧房。
zh.key_metrics: Inter-user Jaccard@Cycle15（Office）：SASRec 0.223 > Mamba4Rec 0.138 > TIGER 0.108 > OneRec 0.064（生成式同质化最低，OneRec 比 SASRec 低约 71%）。分层 code 熵下降（TIGER, Office）：Layer0 53.6% / Layer1 40.4% / Layer2 仅 13.4%（茧房集中在粗层）。模型规模（Toys, Cycle15）：3B 最细层活跃 code 233/256 vs 0.5B 仅 70。

en.method_overview: RecLoop is a large-scale closed-loop simulator where LLM-powered user agents (Qwen3-8B) interact with recommenders over 15 retraining cycles on two Amazon datasets (5K / 20K agents). Each agent has a dynamic profile, dual (short/long-term) memory, periodic reflection, and an action module. Beyond standard exposure-level cocoon metrics, it introduces a model-level Code-Space Structural Cocoon metric (layer-wise code entropy + Top-k concentration).
en.innovation: The first closed-loop LLM-agent simulation for information cocoons in generative recommendation, plus a novel layer-wise code-space cocoon metric and systematic findings (generative is more cocoon-resistant at exposure level; cocoons concentrate at coarse code layers; collaborative-ID tokenization is worse; larger models help).
en.key_metrics: Inter-user Jaccard@Cycle15 (Office): SASRec 0.223 > Mamba4Rec 0.138 > TIGER 0.108 > OneRec 0.064 (~71% lower than SASRec). Layer-wise code-entropy drop (TIGER, Office): Layer0 53.6% / Layer1 40.4% / Layer2 13.4%. Model scale (Toys, Cycle15): 3B keeps 233/256 active codes at the finest layer vs 70 for 0.5B.

title: MODE-RAG: Manifold Outlier Diagnosis and Energy-based Retrieval-Augmented Generation Evaluation
affiliations: Huazhong University of Science and Technology

score.rationale_zh: 机制驱动的动态门控（变分自由能 + 注意力）+ 多智能体治理思路，对多模态内容质量/幻觉治理有借鉴价值；但实证覆盖窄（单一 7B kernel / 自建基准）、SOTA 优势不稳、无开源与电商落地验证。

zh.method_overview: MODE-RAG 是一个由变分自由能（VFE）和内部注意力状态驱动的多智能体框架，用于量化并动态缓解多模态 RAG 的幻觉。核心 FE-Router 作为‘热力学门控’，先评估查询的认知不确定性：低风险查询绕过流程避免过度纠正，高风险（F̄>γ）则触发五智能体解耦流水线（Per/Cor/Ret/Rea/Gen-Agent）。Rea-Agent 用 MCTS 构建因果有向无环图，Gen-Agent 用 logit 扰动抑制谄媚，由 PORAG 驱动的 Overseer 做三重一致性核查并触发递归回退。
zh.story: 现有多模态 RAG 受跨模态幻觉/谄媚困扰，且缓解策略陷入‘干预悖论’（静态规则过度纠正 vs 放任级联编造）→ 设计 VFE/注意力驱动的 FE-Router 做动态门控，并用五智能体（含 MCTS 因果推理、logit 扰动、Overseer 回退）按需精准干预。
zh.innovation: 1）FE-Router：基于变分自由能 + 注意力的自适应门控，化解干预悖论；2）五智能体解耦流水线，分阶段处理多类幻觉/RAG 触发；3）将 MCTS 引入因果 DAG 推理 + logit 扰动抑制谄媚 + Overseer 双奖励校验与递归回退；4）构建 ModeVent 基准（VFE 极值 500 离群 + 500 稳定）。
zh.key_metrics: 全局 Average Total：Baseline 4.40 → MODE-RAG 5.45（+1.04，ΔFidelity +0.89）；Outliers 平均 4.50 → 5.98（+1.48）；Majority Text Bias（Outliers）5.04 → 7.36（+2.31）。五方法对比 Overall Total：MODE-RAG 5.45 > Self-RAG 5.21 > Woodpecker 4.93 > Baseline 4.40。效率约 1.42×、26.2s/query（4×RTX 4090，Qwen-2.5-VL-7B）。

en.method_overview: MODE-RAG is a VFE- and attention-driven multi-agent framework that quantifies and dynamically gates interventions to mitigate multimodal RAG hallucinations. A central FE-Router (thermodynamic gate) routes low-risk queries to bypass intervention and high-risk queries into a decoupled five-agent pipeline; Rea-Agent runs MCTS to build causal DAGs, Gen-Agent applies logit perturbation against sycophancy, and a PORAG Overseer performs triple-consistency checks with a recursive fallback.
en.innovation: A VFE+attention adaptive FE-Router resolving the intervention paradox, a decoupled five-agent pipeline, MCTS causal DAGs + logit perturbation + a dual-reward Overseer, and the new ModeVent benchmark.
en.key_metrics: Global Average Total: 4.40 -> 5.45 (+1.04, dFidelity +0.89); Outliers 4.50 -> 5.98 (+1.48); Majority Text Bias (Outliers) 5.04 -> 7.36 (+2.31). Overall Total: MODE-RAG 5.45 > Self-RAG 5.21 > Woodpecker 4.93 > Baseline 4.40. ~1.42x cost, 26.2s/query (4xRTX 4090, Qwen-2.5-VL-7B).

title: Leveraging Code-Mixed Product Metadata and User Feedback for Personalized Recommendation on Daraz Bangladesh
affiliations: Bangladesh University of Engineering and Technology

score.rationale_zh: 首个孟加拉电商（Daraz/BanglishRev）可复现 Top-N 推荐基准，实证量化了混合语（Banglish）词表碎片化对推荐的损害；方法论严谨但无算法创新、绝对指标低、与‘创作者治理’几乎无关。

zh.method_overview: 本文是首个面向孟加拉 Daraz 电商评论数据（BanglishRev，含孟加拉语 Unicode、英语及拉丁字母转写的 Banglish 混合语）的 Top-N 推荐基准。作者在‘按用户时间排序、留最后一个交互’协议下评测六类模型（GlobalPop、CatPop、UserCF、ItemCF、ExplicitMF-SVD、ImplicitMF-ALS、CBF）。针对极端长尾稀疏做了五档 k-core 阈值消融，并用字符 1–2gram TF-IDF 的内容过滤做按主导书写体系（孟加拉语/英语/Banglish/空）分层评测，量化混合语对推荐质量的影响。属基准/实证类工作，无新模型。
zh.story: 代码混合（Banglish）电商评论对推荐的影响此前完全未被研究、且无现成基准 → 作者构建首个可复现 Top-N 基准 + k-core 稀疏消融 + 按语言分层的内容过滤评测来系统刻画这一影响。
zh.innovation: 1）首个孟加拉电商（Daraz/BanglishRev）可复现 Top-N 推荐基准，评测六类模型；2）首次实证测量 Banglish 词表碎片化对推荐质量的损害；3）五档 k-core 密度消融，揭示不同算法对稀疏度的差异化敏感性，对稀疏场景模型选型有指导意义。
zh.key_metrics: 数据集 BanglishRev：324 万评分 / 934,949 用户 / 128,494 商品，密度 0.0022%，59.3% 用户仅 1 次交互。主基准(10,3)：ItemCF 最优 NDCG@10=0.0270、Hit@10=0.0525；CBF 仅 0.0077。分层 CBF：Banglish 用户 NDCG@10=0.0050，相对孟加拉语用户下降 46.8%（英语 −34.0%）。k-core 消融：ImplicitMF 最受损（Δ−0.0138），ItemCF 最稳健（Δ−0.0047）。

en.method_overview: This is the first reproducible Top-N recommendation benchmark on Bangladeshi Daraz e-commerce reviews (BanglishRev, mixing Bengali Unicode, English, and Latin-script Banglish). Six model families are evaluated under a per-user chronological leave-last-out protocol; a five-level k-core threshold ablation probes extreme sparsity, and a language-stratified content-based filtering study (character 1-2 gram TF-IDF) quantifies how code-mixing degrades recommendation. No new model is proposed.
en.innovation: The first reproducible Bangla e-commerce recommendation benchmark, the first empirical quantification of Banglish vocabulary fragmentation harming recommendation, and a five-level k-core density ablation revealing algorithm-specific sparsity sensitivity.
en.key_metrics: BanglishRev: 3.24M ratings / 934,949 users / 128,494 items, density 0.0022%, 59.3% single-interaction users. Primary (10,3): ItemCF best NDCG@10=0.0270, Hit@10=0.0525; CBF only 0.0077. Stratified CBF: Banglish users NDCG@10=0.0050, -46.8% vs Bengali (English -34.0%). k-core: ImplicitMF most hurt (d -0.0138), ItemCF most robust (d -0.0047).

title: Native Active Perception as Reasoning for Omni-Modal Understanding

score.rationale_zh: 创新性极高（27/30）：首个端到端原生全模态主动感知 Agent，把视频理解建模为 POMDP 的 Observation-Thought-Action 循环，并提出 TAURA 解决 GRPO 多轮训练的优势同质化问题。实验指标强（14/15）：开源模型十项基准 SOTA，7B 在 LVBench 上以更少帧数反超 10× 大的 Qwen2.5-VL-72B。实验质量高（13/15）：十基准+test-time scaling 分析+消融。效率好（9/10）：推理复杂度与视频时长解耦，帧数 −73%。泛化强（5/5）。相关性（18/25）：视频/全模态内容理解与达人内容治理强相关，但非电商场景直击。原文已提供官方代码与权重，按规则无需复现。

reproduce.note: Qwen Team 官方仓库已开源代码+SFT/RL权重，经核实非空仓库，故不复现。

zh.method_overview: OmniAgent 把长视频/全模态理解从被动的“看完全部帧”范式，改造为主动感知的推理过程。它将探索建模为部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP），通过 Observation-Thought-Action（OTA）循环按需地浏览帧、收听音频、观看音视频片段，并把高维瞬时感知蒸馏进一段持久的文本记忆，使内部状态只取决于推理轨迹复杂度而非视频时长。训练分两阶段：先用 best-of-N 轨迹合成+双阶段质控做 Agentic SFT 引导主动感知；再用 Agentic RL 中的 TAURA（按轮自适应不确定性重标定优势）把信用分配引向关键发现轮。模型在十个基准上取得开源 SOTA，并展现“推理轮数越多、性能越好”的 test-time scaling 特性。
zh.innovation: 亮点在于“感知即推理、推理即行动”统一在单个原生模型内，而不是把多模态感知外包给工具模块导致梯度断裂。核心创新有二：(1) 用 POMDP+持久文本记忆把推理复杂度与视频时长解耦，从而能在小时级视频上扩展；(2) TAURA 通过轮级熵识别关键轮，修正 GRPO 把关键发现轮与琐碎动作混为一谈的“优势同质化”。相较“thinking with images”等半被动方法（仍需全局预扫或维持稠密视觉缓存），它真正实现按需取证。
zh.key_metrics: 亮眼实验：在 10 个基准上全面超过 Qwen2.5-Omni 直接基线，取得开源模型 SOTA。长视频：LVBench 50.5%、MLVU 71.1%；全模态：DailyOmni +4.7%、OmniVideo +7.8%；时序定位：LongVALE 绝对 +33.4%。效率/能力联合证据：7B Agent 在 LVBench 上 50.5% vs Qwen2.5-VL-72B 47.3%（参数小 10×、帧数少 73%）。Test-time scaling：VideoMME-Long 随推理轮数增加 +6.2%。

en.method_overview: OmniAgent reframes long-video / omni-modal understanding from a passive watch-it-all paradigm into an active-perception reasoning process. It formulates exploration as a POMDP and, via an Observation-Thought-Action (OTA) cycle, on-demand browses frames, listens to audio, and watches audio-visual clips, distilling high-dimensional transient percepts into a persistent textual memory so that internal state depends only on reasoning-trace complexity rather than raw video duration. Training has two stages: Agentic SFT (best-of-N trajectory synthesis with dual-stage quality control) to bootstrap active perception, then Agentic RL with TAURA (Turn-aware Adaptive Uncertainty Rescaled Advantage) to steer credit toward pivotal discovery turns. It achieves open-source SOTA across ten benchmarks and shows positive test-time scaling.
en.innovation: The key novelty is unifying perception, reasoning and action inside a single native model instead of outsourcing perception to external tools (which severs gradient flow). Two contributions stand out: (1) a POMDP + persistent textual memory that decouples reasoning complexity from video length, enabling hour-long scaling; (2) TAURA, which uses turn-level entropy to fix GRPO's advantage homogenization that conflates pivotal turns with trivial actions. Unlike semi-passive thinking-with-images methods that still pre-scan or keep dense visual buffers, OmniAgent truly gathers evidence on demand.
en.key_metrics: Highlights: beats the Qwen2.5-Omni baseline on all 10 benchmarks (open-source SOTA). Long video: LVBench 50.5%, MLVU 71.1%; omni-modal: DailyOmni +4.7%, OmniVideo +7.8%; temporal grounding: LongVALE +33.4% absolute. Capability-efficiency: 7B agent reaches 50.5% on LVBench vs 47.3% for the 10x larger Qwen2.5-VL-72B with 73% fewer frames. Test-time scaling: +6.2% on VideoMME-Long as reasoning turns increase.

title: ProductConsistency: Improving Product Identity Preservation in Instruction-Based Image Editing via SFT and RL

score.rationale_zh: 相关性满分（25/25）：直击电商/商品营销图编辑——品牌、Logo、商品几何与商品上文字的保真，是内容生态的核心痛点。创新性较好（23/30）：提出 Cyclic Consistency 奖励（用编辑后图的 caption 与原商品描述的相似度作为商品身份保真代理）+ 全自动合成数据管线 + 新基准。实验（12/15）：CER 5× 下降、Seg CLIP-I/DINO-I/OCR 全面提升，并用闭源 MLLM 做裁判。实验质量（13/15）：两套底座（Qwen-Image-Edit-2511、Flux.1-Kontext-dev）、870 样例基准、奖励消融。效率（5/10）：依赖大扩散模型微调，开销大。评分≥80：原文代码托管于匿名双盲站点、可复现性与可运行性不确定，故按要求进行忠实 PyTorch 复现。

reproduce.note: 原文代码为匿名双盲链接，难以确认完整可运行；按要求对核心方法（Cyclic Consistency 奖励 + SFT/RL 管线）做忠实 toy 复现。

zh.method_overview: ProductConsistency 面向电商/广告中的指令式商品图编辑：现有开源与闭源编辑器在改背景、换场景时常常扭曲商品几何、篡改 Logo、拼错或幻觉商品上的文字。作者首先用全自动管线合成带唯一品牌标识与可验证渲染文字的商品图，构建 87k 的 SFT 数据、869 张图的 RL 数据以及 174 图/870 样例的人审基准。训练上，SFT 让模型学会保身份编辑；RL 阶段提出 Cyclic Consistency 奖励——对编辑后图重新生成 caption，与原始商品描述做相似度比较，作为“商品身份是否保持”的语义代理奖励，并叠加指令遵从、视觉一致、文字保真等子奖励。在 Qwen-Image-Edit-2511 与 Flux.1-Kontext-dev 上微调，商品一致性、文字渲染与整体观感均一致提升。
zh.innovation: 核心创新是把“商品身份保真”这一难以直接监督的目标，转化为一个可计算、可优化的循环一致性奖励：原描述→编辑图→再 caption→与原描述比相似度，形成语义闭环，避免了像素级强约束带来的编辑僵化。配套的合成数据管线生成“带唯一品牌+可验证文字”的商品图，使大规模可控监督成为可能；并首次给出聚焦品牌/文字保真的商品编辑基准（此前基准要么忽略渲染文字、要么只看文档版式）。创新点合理且工程可落地，主要局限是奖励依赖 caption 模型与 OCR 的质量。
zh.key_metrics: 亮眼实验：在 ProductConsistency Benchmark（174 图、8 类、870 样例）上，相对基线全面提升。Qwen-Image-Edit-2511 在文字保真上字符错误率（CER）下降约 5×；分割区域内的 Seg CLIP-I、Seg DINO-I（商品身份保持）与 OCR 指标均提升；闭源 MLLM 三维裁判（商品一致性 / OCR 保真 / 美观）一致占优。两套底座（Qwen-Image-Edit-2511、Flux.1-Kontext-dev）均观察到一致收益。

en.method_overview: ProductConsistency targets instruction-based product image editing for e-commerce/advertising, where existing open and closed editors distort product geometry, alter logos, or misspell/hallucinate on-object text when changing scenes. The authors build a fully automated pipeline that synthesizes product images with unique branding and verifiable rendered text, yielding an 87k SFT set, an 869-image RL set, and a human-verified benchmark of 174 images / 870 samples. SFT teaches identity-preserving edits; the RL stage introduces a Cyclic Consistency reward that re-captions the edited image and compares it with the original product description as a semantic proxy for identity preservation, combined with instruction-adherence, visual-consistency and text-fidelity sub-rewards. Fine-tuning Qwen-Image-Edit-2511 and Flux.1-Kontext-dev yields consistent gains.
en.innovation: The core idea turns the hard-to-supervise goal of product identity preservation into a computable, optimizable cyclic-consistency reward: description -> edited image -> re-caption -> similarity to the original description, forming a semantic loop that avoids the rigidity of pixel-level spatial constraints. A synthetic data pipeline that injects unique brands and verifiable text enables scalable, controllable supervision, and the paper provides the first benchmark focused on brand/text fidelity in product editing. The design is reasonable and deployable; its main limitation is dependence on the quality of the captioner and OCR.
en.key_metrics: Highlights: on the ProductConsistency Benchmark (174 images, 8 categories, 870 samples) it improves over baselines across the board. Qwen-Image-Edit-2511 cuts the OCR character error rate (CER) by about 5x; Seg CLIP-I, Seg DINO-I (identity preservation) and OCR metrics all improve; a closed-source MLLM judge (product consistency / OCR fidelity / aesthetics) consistently favors the trained models. Gains hold for both Qwen-Image-Edit-2511 and Flux.1-Kontext-dev.

title: SAMA: Semantic Anchor-aligned Augmentation for Unified Low-Resource Multimodal Information Extraction
affiliations: University of Electronic Science and Technology of China (UESTC)

score.rationale_zh: 创新性好（24/30）：统一框架同时服务 MNER/MRE/MEE，用从标签构造的“语义锚点”对齐跨模态，配 CME-MLLM（通用 Adapter+任务 Adapter）与锚点保持扩散，再用双约束过滤免人工核验。实验（12/15）：在多个骨干上一致超过 mixGen/GMDA/CAMIM 等增强基线，低资源更明显。实验质量（13/15）：三任务+全/低资源+消融。效率（5/10）：MLLM+扩散，生成开销大。泛化（5/5）：跨三任务统一。相关性（18/25）：多模态内容理解、数据增强与大规模打标，与内容生态数据质量相关，但偏社媒 IE 而非电商直击。<80，不复现，原文亦已开源。

zh.method_overview: SAMA 针对多模态信息抽取（MNER 命名实体识别、MRE 关系抽取、MEE 事件抽取）在低资源下数据稀缺、跨模态对齐粗糙、且各任务架构割裂的问题，提出统一的数据增强框架。它从真值标签构造结构化“语义锚点”，用一个协作多专家多模态大模型 CME-MLLM（共享语义的通用 Adapter + 各任务专属 Adapter）生成多样但符合约束的文本样本；图像侧用“锚点保持扩散”——以锚点加权提示与隐变量条件，在多样化视觉背景的同时保住关键语义锚点。最后用“双约束过滤”按跨模态一致性与锚点保真自动筛选合成样本，免去人工核验。
zh.innovation: 创新在于用“语义锚点”作为跨模态对齐与多任务共享的统一中介：既约束文本生成不偏离标签语义，又约束图像生成不丢关键对象，从而修复传统按模态独立增强导致的跨模态语义鸿沟。多专家共享语义的设计让 MNER/MRE/MEE 互相受益，打破任务专用架构的壁垒；双约束过滤把“生成-筛选”闭环自动化，降低对人工的依赖。整体是合理且可复用的数据增强范式，代价是依赖 MLLM 与扩散的生成成本。
zh.key_metrics: 亮眼实验：在 MNER/MRE/MEE 多个基准、多种骨干（MMT5、PGIM、HVPNeT、TMR 等）上叠加 SAMA 后 F1 一致提升，且优于 mixGen、GMDA、CAMIM 等增强基线。例如 HVPNeT 骨干上 SAMA 将 F1 提升到 78.2/81.9/80.9/83.4（各列对应不同设置），普遍较次优基线 +1~3 F1；低资源设置下增益更明显，验证了合成数据质量与泛化性。

en.method_overview: SAMA is a unified data-augmentation framework for multimodal information extraction (MNER, MRE, MEE) under low-resource settings, addressing data scarcity, coarse cross-modal alignment, and fragmented per-task designs. It builds structured semantic anchors from ground-truth labels and uses a Collaborative Multi-Experts MLLM (CME-MLLM: a Universal Adapter for shared semantics plus Task-Specific Adapters) to generate diverse yet constraint-compliant text; for images it uses Anchor-Preserving Diffusion with anchor-weighted prompts and latent conditioning to diversify visual context while retaining critical anchors. A Dual-Constraint Filtering module then auto-selects synthetic samples by cross-modal consistency and anchor fidelity, removing manual verification.
en.innovation: The novelty is using semantic anchors as a unified medium for both cross-modal alignment and multi-task sharing: they constrain text generation to stay faithful to label semantics and constrain image generation to keep key objects, repairing the cross-modal gap caused by per-modality augmentation. The multi-expert shared-semantics design lets MNER/MRE/MEE benefit each other, breaking task-specific silos, while dual-constraint filtering automates the generate-then-select loop. It is a reasonable, reusable augmentation paradigm, at the cost of MLLM + diffusion generation overhead.
en.key_metrics: Highlights: across MNER/MRE/MEE benchmarks and multiple backbones (MMT5, PGIM, HVPNeT, TMR, ...), adding SAMA consistently raises F1 and beats augmentation baselines (mixGen, GMDA, CAMIM). For example, on the HVPNeT backbone SAMA reaches F1 of 78.2/81.9/80.9/83.4 across settings, typically +1-3 F1 over the second-best baseline, with larger gains in low-resource regimes.

title: APT: Atomic Physical Transitions for Causal Video-Language Understanding

score.rationale_zh: 创新性好（24/30）：提出 Atomic Physical Transitions（APT）——把视频从单一事件标签拆成有序、带时间戳的“机制化状态变迁链”，作为事件识别与物理仿真之间缺失的中间表示。实验（12/15）：APT recall 10%→38.1%（+28.1pp），并迁移到 PhysBench、SSv2 多选 +15pp。实验质量（13/15）：8 个零样本 VLM 评测+消融+迁移。效率（9/10）：Qwen3-VL-2B 仅 11M LoRA。泛化（5/5）。相关性（14/25）：视频-语言因果理解对内容理解有借鉴，但聚焦物理机制，与电商达人治理关联较弱。<80，不复现。

reproduce.note: 评分<80，不复现；原文提供 project page。

zh.method_overview: APT 认为物理事件不能只用名字（如“bounce”）理解，而应还原其因果状态变化。作者定义 Atomic Physical Transitions（原子物理变迁）：最小、时间局部化的状态变化，把一个可见线索绑定到一个激活的物理机制与前/后动力学状态；一段视频被表示为有序的 APT 链，回答“为什么发生”。他们用人工标注+仿真真值构建混合数据（14 类变迁、1246 个 trial、27303 个带时间实例）。发现当前 VLM 几乎抓不到变迁级物理（零样本 recall ≤14%），而直接微调又导致事件级遗忘。于是提出 APT-Tune：图像-pad 感知监督、格式条件协同训练、机制条件的域到类型解码，在 Qwen3-VL-2B 上仅用 11M LoRA 参数即可在不遗忘常规问答的前提下学会因果变迁。
zh.innovation: 创新在于提出一种“人类对齐的因果监督信号”，把视频理解的监督单位从 clip 级标签下沉到机制化、可迁移的状态变迁链；这是事件识别与完整物理仿真之间缺失的中间表示，且因按机制（而非外观）定义，可同时用于标注、评测、仿真规格与训练。APT-Tune 用格式条件协同训练化解“学会一种答案格式而非可复用物理表征”的过拟合问题。创新合理、数据构建扎实，主要面向物理视频，泛化到更广内容理解尚需验证。
zh.key_metrics: 亮眼实验：8 个零样本 VLM 在 14 类设置下 recall 仅 10–14%，错误主要来自漏检变迁，说明 clip 级能力≠变迁级物理理解。APT-Tune 在 Qwen3-VL-2B（11M LoRA）上把 APT recall 从 10.0% 提到 38.1%（+28.1pp），无需在 PhysBench 上训练即可迁移，且把 Something-Something v2 多选准确率较底座 +15pp。

en.method_overview: APT argues physical events should be understood by their causal state changes, not by names like 'bounce'. It defines Atomic Physical Transitions: minimal, temporally localized state changes binding a visible cue to an active physical mechanism and before/after dynamical regimes; a video is represented as an ordered APT chain that explains why an event happened. The authors build mixed-source data from human annotation and simulator ground truth (14 transition types, 1,246 trials, 27,303 timed instances). They find current VLMs largely miss transition-level physics (zero-shot recall <=14%), while direct fine-tuning causes event-level forgetting. APT-Tune fixes this with image-pad-aware supervision, format-conditional co-training, and mechanism-conditioned domain-to-type decoding, using only 11M LoRA params on Qwen3-VL-2B.
en.innovation: The novelty is a human-aligned causal supervision signal that moves the supervision unit from clip-level labels to mechanism-typed, transferable transition chains, a missing intermediate representation between event recognition and full physical simulation; because it is defined by mechanism rather than appearance, one schema supports annotation, evaluation, simulation specs and training. APT-Tune's format-conditional co-training resolves overfitting to a single answer format. The design is sound with solid data construction, though it targets physical video and broader transfer needs more validation.
en.key_metrics: Highlights: eight zero-shot VLMs achieve only 10-14% recall in the 14-type setting, dominated by missed transitions, showing clip-level competence != transition-level physics. APT-Tune on Qwen3-VL-2B (11M LoRA) raises APT recall from 10.0% to 38.1% (+28.1pp), transfers to PhysBench without training on it, and improves Something-Something v2 multiple-choice accuracy by +15pp over the base model.

title: Decoupling Search from Reasoning: A Vendor-Agnostic Grounding Architecture for LLM Agents

score.rationale_zh: 工程/系统贡献为主（创新 18/30）：把搜索接地从模型厂商黑盒中解耦为厂商无关的 MCP 网关，暴露提供商路由、来源感知上下文渲染、回退、检索深度与缓存等一等公民控制。实验（10/15）：准确率近原生，主打成本/时延/可控性；非算法 SOTA。实验质量（12/15）：5 个前沿模型+3 公测基准+生产工作负载。效率（9/10）：成本 −91~98%、暖缓存命中 99.4%、时延 −68%。泛化（4/5）。相关性（17/25）：含电商 Query 意图理解（QIU）生产负载，Agent/RAG 与达人治理工具链相关。<80，不复现（系统/网关类工作，复现价值有限）。

reproduce.note: 系统/网关工程为主，评分<80，不复现。

zh.method_overview: DSG（Decoupled Search Grounding）针对生产级 LLM Agent 的实时搜索接地问题：原生搜索把检索策略、提供商选择、证据注入、成本、时延与生成行为都捆在模型厂商边界后面，难以审查、调参、复用与迁移，还会引发“搜索诱导的啰嗦”破坏严格输出契约。作者提出一个厂商无关、兼容 MCP 的网关，把接地移出推理模型之外，将提供商路由、来源感知上下文渲染、可配置回退、检索深度控制与精确+语义缓存暴露为一等公民控制。这样推理模型可随意替换，而检索成为可优化的接口边界。
zh.innovation: 创新主要是系统抽象与工程权衡，而非新算法：把“搜索接地”从模型的固定特性重新定义为可控接口边界，是其核心贡献。它识别并缓解了 native search 的“搜索诱导啰嗦”这一提示遵从风险，并通过缓存网关在准确率几乎不降的前提下大幅压成本与时延。局限是算法新颖性有限、收益依赖具体提供商与负载，更多是面向落地的最佳实践。
zh.key_metrics: 亮眼实验：跨 5 个前沿模型（GPT-4o/4o-mini、Gemini 2.5 Flash/Pro、Claude Sonnet 4）与 SimpleQA/FreshQA/HotpotQA。SimpleQA 上 DSG 86.1% 接近原生 87.7%，但搜索成本降 91%；暖缓存命中 99.4%、时延降 68%；在电商 Query 意图理解（QIU）生产负载上准确率追平或略超原生搜索，同时搜索成本下降 98% 以上。FreshQA 这类时效敏感任务原生搜索仍占优。

en.method_overview: DSG (Decoupled Search Grounding) tackles real-time search grounding for production LLM agents: native search bundles retrieval policy, provider choice, evidence injection, cost, latency and generation behavior behind a model-provider boundary, making grounding hard to inspect, tune, reuse or port, and can trigger Search-Induced Verbosity that breaks strict output contracts. The authors propose a vendor-agnostic, MCP-compatible gateway that moves grounding outside the reasoning model and exposes provider routing, source-aware context rendering, configured fallback, retrieval-depth control, and exact + semantic caching as first-class controls, keeping the reasoning model interchangeable while retrieval becomes an optimizable interface boundary.
en.innovation: The contribution is mainly a systems abstraction and engineering trade-off rather than a new algorithm: redefining search grounding from a fixed model feature into a controllable interface boundary is the core idea. It identifies and mitigates Search-Induced Verbosity (a prompt-compliance risk of native search) and, via a caching gateway, cuts cost and latency dramatically at near-parity accuracy. Limitations are limited algorithmic novelty and provider/workload-dependent gains; it is best read as deployment best practice.
en.key_metrics: Highlights: across 5 frontier models (GPT-4o/4o-mini, Gemini 2.5 Flash/Pro, Claude Sonnet 4) and SimpleQA/FreshQA/HotpotQA. On SimpleQA, DSG reaches 86.1% vs native 87.7% at 91% lower search cost; 99.4% warm-cache hit rate, 68% lower latency; on a production e-commerce Query Intent Understanding (QIU) workload it matches or slightly exceeds native search while cutting search cost by over 98%. Native search still leads on recency-sensitive FreshQA.

title: A Multi-Domain Benchmark for Detecting AI-Generated Text-Rich Images from GPT-Image-2

score.rationale_zh: 以基准/评测为主、无新方法（创新 12/30、实验 7/15）：构建 GPT-Image-2 生成的“文本密集型”图像多域基准（8602 图、6 类：商业海报/信息图/学术海报/收据/表格/UI 截图），零样本评测 5 个检测器+1 个 VLM。实验质量（11/15）：含分类目与后处理鲁棒性分析。相关性（17/25）：AI 生成内容检测、内容真实性与治理相关，但偏文档型图像、非达人内容直击。价值在于揭示检测器域依赖与对 JPEG 压缩的脆弱性。<80，不复现。

reproduce.note: 基准/评测类工作、无新方法，评分<80，不复现。

zh.method_overview: 随着 GPT-Image-2 等多模态生成模型能稳定渲染连贯文字与结构化版式，检测“文本密集型”AI 生成图像（海报、信息图、收据、表格、UI 截图等，常含隐私/交易/决策信息）成为内容真实性与数字信任的新挑战。作者构建一个多域基准：8602 张 GPT-Image-2 生成图，覆盖商业海报、信息图、学术海报、收据、表格、UI 截图 6 类，并提出基于“文本-版式规整度×功能语境”的二维刻画与隐私保护的提示合成管线（不使用原始文字或身份）。基于该基准，零样本评测 5 个代表性 AI 生成图检测器与 1 个多模态 VLM，做整体、分类目与后处理鲁棒性分析。
zh.innovation: 本文不提新检测方法，价值在于补齐“文本密集型 + 现代生成模型”这一被忽视的评测空白，并给出二维问题刻画与隐私保护合成管线。核心发现是：检测器性能高度依赖类目（在某些类好、换类目就失效），且即便最强的传统检测器对 JPEG 压缩也极其敏感；VLM 能提升整体检测但在结构化文本图上仍不可靠。提示了需要“文本/版式感知”的检测方法。作为资源型工作合理，但方法创新与 SOTA 推进有限。
zh.key_metrics: 亮眼实验：基准含 8602 图、6 类。零样本评测显示检测性能强烈依赖域——某类表现好的方法在另一类常失败；即便最强传统检测器在 JPEG 压缩下也出现严重性能下降（鲁棒性脆弱）。探索性引入多模态 VLM 后整体检测有提升，但在收据/表格/UI 等结构化文本图上仍不可靠，凸显对文本-版式感知检测的需求。

en.method_overview: As multimodal generators like GPT-Image-2 reliably render coherent text and structured layouts, detecting AI-generated text-rich images (posters, infographics, receipts, tables, UI screenshots, often carrying privacy/transactional/decision-relevant info) becomes a key challenge for content authenticity and digital trust. The authors build a multi-domain benchmark of 8,602 GPT-Image-2 images across six categories (commercial posters, infographics, academic posters, receipts, tables, UI screenshots), with a two-dimensional formulation (text-layout regularity x functional context) and a privacy-preserving prompt-synthesis pipeline (no original text or identities). They then evaluate five representative AI-image detectors and one multimodal VLM zero-shot, with overall, per-category and post-processing robustness analyses.
en.innovation: The paper proposes no new detector; its value is filling the overlooked evaluation gap of text-rich images from modern generators, plus a two-dimensional problem formulation and a privacy-preserving synthesis pipeline. Key findings: detector performance is highly category-dependent (good on some, failing on others), even the strongest conventional detector is very sensitive to JPEG compression, and a VLM improves overall detection but remains unreliable on structured text-rich images, motivating text-/layout-aware detection. A reasonable resource paper, but limited methodological novelty.
en.key_metrics: Highlights: the benchmark has 8,602 images across 6 categories. Zero-shot evaluation shows performance is strongly domain-dependent (a method strong on one category often fails on another); even the strongest conventional detector degrades severely under JPEG compression. Adding a multimodal VLM improves overall detection but remains unreliable on structured text-rich images (receipts/tables/UI), highlighting the need for text- and layout-aware detection.

title: PerceptionDLM: Parallel Region Perception with Multimodal Diffusion Language Models

score.rationale_zh: 创新性极高（27/30）：首次利用扩散语言模型固有的 token 级并行性实现并行区域描述/感知，提出区域提示+结构化注意力掩码在保留全局上下文的同时强制区域间独立，打破自回归区域描述的线性延迟增长。实验指标（12/15）：扩散 VLM 中 SOTA（ParaDLC 62.4% 近翻倍），但准确率略低于 AR 模型，换来巨大速度优势。实验质量（13/15）：16 基准 + 新建 ParaDLC-Bench + 效率剖析 + 消融。效率（9/10）：密集区域最高 3.5× 提速、满并行 3.44×。泛化（4/5）：多基准但偏 captioning。相关性（23/25）：区域级内容理解/电商商品描述强相关，且来自字节。原文已提供完整官方代码（含 smallvlm/scripts/evaluation/configs，经核实非空仓库），按规则无需复现。

reproduce.note: github.com/MSALab-PKU/PerceptionDLM 已开源完整代码（smallvlm、scripts、evaluation、configs 等），经 GitHub API 核实非空仓库，故不复现。

zh.method_overview: PerceptionDLM 是面向高效并行区域感知的多模态扩散语言模型。它先构建 PerceptionDLM-Base（SigLIP-2 视觉编码器 + LLaDA-8B 扩散语言骨干 + 4 阶段视觉指令微调），是当前最强的开源扩散 VLM；在其之上引入三个组件——区域提示（为每个区域配可学习嵌入）、RoI 对齐特征回放、以及结构化（块状）注意力掩码——使模型可在单次扩散去噪过程中同时为多个掩码区域生成描述，而不像自回归模型逐区域、逐 token 串行解码。
zh.innovation: 故事线：现有 MLLM 大多依赖自回归解码，区域级密集描述时区域越多延迟线性暴涨；扩散语言模型天生并行但直接用于细粒度感知会出现感知弱、多区域相互串扰。作者用区域提示绑定区域身份、用结构化注意力掩码限定每个区域只关注全局视觉 token、共享文本提示、自身 RoI 特征与自身描述 span，从而在保留全局上下文的同时强制区域独立，把区域感知从串行变并行。这是首个利用扩散 LM 并行性实现并行区域描述/感知的工作，创新合理、工程价值高，并贡献了同时评测质量与效率的 ParaDLC-Bench。
zh.key_metrics: 亮眼实验：PerceptionDLM-Base 在 16 个多模态基准中 15 个超过 LLaDA-V；ParaDLC-Bench 平均准确率 62.4%，近乎翻倍超过 LLaDA-V(35.2%)、SDAR-VL(31.3%)；TPF 达 2.9（AR/扩散基线均为 1），整 benchmark 推理时间从 GAR 的 479s 降至 276s（PixelRefer 718s）；密集区域（5 masks/图）吞吐最高 3.5×，4 masks 满并行时单图延迟从 10.04s 降到 2.92s（3.44×）。

en.method_overview: PerceptionDLM is a multimodal diffusion language model for efficient parallel region perception. It first builds PerceptionDLM-Base (SigLIP-2 vision encoder + LLaDA-8B diffusion backbone, 4-stage visual instruction tuning), the strongest open diffusion VLM. On top, region prompting (a learnable embedding per region), RoI-aligned feature replay and a structured (block-wise) attention masking mechanism let the model denoise captions for multiple masked regions simultaneously within a single diffusion process, instead of decoding each region sequentially as autoregressive (AR) models do.
en.innovation: Story: most MLLMs rely on AR decoding, so dense region captioning grows linearly in latency with region count; diffusion LMs are inherently parallel but, applied naively to fine-grained perception, suffer weak perception and cross-region interference. PerceptionDLM binds region identity via region prompts and restricts each region's tokens (through structured attention masking) to global visual tokens, shared text prompt, its own RoI features and its own caption span, enforcing region independence while preserving global context. It is the first to achieve parallel region captioning/perception by exploiting diffusion-LM parallelism, with a reasonable, deployable design, and contributes ParaDLC-Bench measuring both quality and efficiency.
en.key_metrics: Highlights: PerceptionDLM-Base beats LLaDA-V on 15 of 16 multimodal benchmarks; on ParaDLC-Bench it reaches 62.4% average accuracy, nearly doubling LLaDA-V (35.2%) and SDAR-VL (31.3%); TPF reaches 2.9 (AR/diffusion baselines are 1), cutting total benchmark inference time from 479s (GAR) to 276s (PixelRefer 718s); dense-region throughput speeds up to 3.5x, and at 4-mask full parallelism single-image latency drops from 10.04s to 2.92s (3.44x).

title: Non-negative Elastic Net Decoding for Information Retrieval

score.rationale_zh: 创新性强（25/30）：把检索从“各文档独立内积打分”重构为“稀疏非负重建/联合集合选择”，并给出相对稠密检索的可证明严格分离结论；理论扎实。实验（12/15）：冻结嵌入直接套用即一致提升（完整性最高 +36%），端到端训练版在全部基准全部指标超过稠密检索。实验质量（12/15）：理论+实验+端到端训练（展开 FISTA）。效率（7/10）：引入 FISTA 求解增加解码开销。泛化（4/5）：多基准但单一任务。相关性（18/25）：向量化表征/检索/RAG 与内容生态向量召回相关。<80，不复现。

zh.method_overview: NNN（非负弹性网络）解码把检索从“各文档独立内积打分”重构成“联合解码”：选出一组文档，使其嵌入以稀疏、非负的线性组合（弹性网正则）联合重建查询嵌入，从而让选择具备“语料感知”，减少冗余近重复结果。它可在测试期直接作用于冻结嵌入（仅 2 个超参），也可通过展开的 FISTA 求解器端到端优化嵌入。
zh.innovation: 故事线：稠密检索中每个文档分数只取决于查询与它自身的嵌入，对整个语料“盲视”，因而易选出语义相似、冗余重复的集合。NNN 把检索建成对查询嵌入的稀疏非负重建，引入文档间的相互竞争与互补，在保持相关性的同时提升多样性与完整性。作者还证明了严格分离：NNN 能处理稠密检索能处理的所有查询，外加相关语料上稠密检索无法处理的查询。创新性较强、理论扎实。
zh.key_metrics: 亮眼实验：对冻结的内积训练嵌入直接套用 NNN，在多个基准上一致提升，完整性(completeness)指标最高 +36%，且差距随相关文档数量增加而扩大；端到端训练版本在全部基准、全部指标上均超过稠密检索。

en.method_overview: NNN (Non-Negative elastic Net) decoding reformulates retrieval from independent inner-product scoring into a joint decoding problem: it selects a set of documents whose embeddings jointly reconstruct the query embedding as a sparse, non-negative linear combination (elastic-net regularized), making selection corpus-aware and reducing redundant near-duplicates. It works on frozen embeddings at test time (only 2 hyperparameters) and can be trained end-to-end via an unrolled FISTA solver.
en.innovation: Story: in dense retrieval each document score depends only on the query and its own embedding, blind to the rest of the corpus, so it tends to pick semantically similar, redundant sets. NNN casts retrieval as sparse non-negative reconstruction of the query embedding, introducing competition and complementarity among documents to improve diversity/completeness while preserving relevance. The authors prove a strict separation: NNN handles every query dense retrieval handles, plus correlated-corpus queries it cannot. Strong novelty with solid theory.
en.key_metrics: Highlights: applying NNN to frozen inner-product-trained embeddings yields consistent gains across benchmarks, up to +36% on the completeness metric, with the gap widening as the number of relevant documents grows; the end-to-end-trained version surpasses dense retrieval on all metrics and benchmarks.

title: Visuals Lie, Consistency Speaks: Disentangling Spatial Attention from Reliability in Vision-Language Models

score.rationale_zh: 创新性较好（22/30）：用跨模型族证据系统性证伪“注意力即接地/可靠性”这一主流假设（R≈0.001），并指出生成期自一致性与隐状态探针才是真正可靠性信号（R=0.429）；属于有价值的洞见型工作但非新算法。实验（9/15）：以相关性/因果分析为主，非 SOTA 准确率。实验质量（12/15）：跨模型族+因果层消融+逐层动态分析。效率（6/10）：分析型工作。泛化（5/5）：覆盖多模型族。相关性（17/25）：VLM 可靠性/幻觉检测对内容治理有用，但偏机理分析。<80，不复现。

reproduce.note: 分析型工作、评分<80，不复现。

zh.method_overview: 这是一篇分析型论文（VLM 可靠性探针 VRP），挑战“注意力-置信度假设”。它提出结构化注意力指标（簇数 Ck、空间熵 Hs、跨层注意力演化 ΔHs），发现“符号脱节/早锁定”现象，并证明空间注意力与准确率近乎零相关（R≈0.001，“簇失效”）；相反，自一致性（多采样推理路径的一致率）才是真值的主导预测因子（R=0.429）。因果层消融显示 LLaVA 把预测锁死在脆弱的后期瓶颈层，而 PaliGemma/Qwen2-VL 把可靠性全局分布、即使破坏约 50% 最关键层仍极具韧性。
zh.innovation: 故事线：大家普遍假设“注意力越聚焦于相关区域、回答越可靠”，并据此判断幻觉。作者跨模型族系统验证后发现该假设站不住脚——空间注意力与正确率几乎无关，真正的可靠性信号来自生成动态（自一致性）与隐状态分布。这为幻觉检测/可靠性评估指明了新方向：与其看注意力图，不如看生成一致性与隐状态探针。洞见有价值，但非新算法。
zh.key_metrics: 亮眼实验：空间注意力结构指标与准确率相关性 R≈0.001（几乎无关）；自一致性与真值相关性 R=0.429（最强预测因子）；激进层消融下 Qwen2-VL/PaliGemma 即使破坏约 50%+ 最具预测力的层仍稳健，LLaVA 则迅速崩溃，揭示可靠性的架构性差异。

en.method_overview: An analysis paper (VLM Reliability Probe, VRP) that challenges the Attention-Confidence Assumption. It introduces structural-attention metrics (cluster counts Ck, spatial entropy Hs, cross-layer attention evolution Delta-Hs), finds Symbolic Detachment / Early Locking, and shows spatial attention has near-zero correlation (R~0.001) with accuracy (Cluster Failure). Instead, Self-Consistency (agreement across sampled reasoning paths) is the dominant truth predictor (R=0.429). Causal layer ablation shows LLaVA locks predictions in a fragile late-stage bottleneck, while PaliGemma/Qwen2-VL distribute reliability globally and stay robust even when ~50% of the most predictive layer is destroyed.
en.innovation: Story: the field assumes tighter attention on relevant regions implies more reliable answers, and uses it to judge hallucination. Cross-family experiments debunk this: spatial attention is essentially uncorrelated with accuracy, and the real reliability signal comes from generation dynamics (self-consistency) and hidden-state distributions. This redirects hallucination detection/reliability estimation away from attention maps toward generation consistency and hidden-state probes. Valuable insight, but not a new algorithm.
en.key_metrics: Highlights: structural-attention metrics correlate with accuracy at R~0.001 (essentially none); self-consistency correlates with truth at R=0.429 (the strongest predictor); under aggressive layer ablation, Qwen2-VL/PaliGemma stay robust even when ~50%+ of the most predictive layer is destroyed, while LLaVA collapses quickly, revealing architectural divergence in where reliability lives.

title: Looped World Models

score.rationale_zh: 创新性高（26/30）：首个面向世界建模的循环/参数共享架构，提出“迭代潜在深度”这一与模型规模、数据正交的新扩展轴，并支持逐步自适应算力。实验（12/15）：最高 100× 参数效率，部分任务 SOTA（极端类别从 0% 到 100%）。实验质量（11/15）：多基线+错误分析。效率（9/10）：100× 参数效率但需自适应计算。泛化（4/5）：多任务。相关性（8/25）：世界模型/具身 RL 为当前热点，但与电商内容生态&达人治理弱相关，作为高热度论文纳入。<80，不复现。

reproduce.note: 与电商内容治理弱相关、评分<80，作为热点论文收录但不复现。

zh.method_overview: Looped World Models（LoopWM）是首个用于世界建模的“循环”架构。它不靠堆叠深层网络，而是反复施加同一个参数共享的 Transformer 块来迭代精炼潜在环境状态，并用自适应计算根据每一步预测的复杂度动态调整循环次数（有效深度）。这把“迭代潜在深度”确立为与模型规模、训练数据正交的新扩展轴。
zh.innovation: 故事线：世界模型面临根本矛盾——忠实的长程模拟需要深层计算，但更深的模型部署昂贵且易累积误差。LoopWM 用参数共享循环块按需扩展有效深度，在大幅压缩参数量的同时按预测难度自适应分配算力，从而缓解“深度 vs 成本/误差累积”的张力。想法新颖、是热门方向，但与电商内容治理直接关联较弱。
zh.key_metrics: 亮眼实验：相比常规方法最高 100× 参数效率；在 AlfWorld 等世界建模任务（基于连续 5 个动作预测计分）上超过 Hyperloop Transformer 等多个基线；极端类别如 Lifespan 分数从 0% 提升到 100%，展示参数共享循环块的强表达力。

en.method_overview: Looped World Models (LoopWM) are the first looped architectures for world modelling. Instead of stacking deep layers, they iteratively refine latent environment states by repeatedly applying a single parameter-shared transformer block, with adaptive computation that scales the number of loops (effective depth) to each prediction step's complexity. This establishes iterative latent depth as a new scaling axis, orthogonal to model size and training data.
en.innovation: Story: world models face a fundamental tension, faithful long-horizon simulation needs deep computation, but deeper models are costly to deploy and prone to compounding errors. LoopWM uses a parameter-shared looped block to expand effective depth on demand, drastically cutting parameters while adaptively allocating compute by prediction difficulty. A novel idea in a hot direction, but only weakly tied to e-commerce content governance.
en.key_metrics: Highlights: up to 100x parameter efficiency over conventional approaches; on world-modelling tasks like AlfWorld (scored by predicting five consecutive actions) it beats baselines including Hyperloop Transformers; on extreme categories such as Lifespan it lifts the score from 0% to 100%, showing the expressive power of the parameter-shared looped block.

title: TimeProVe: Propose, then Verify for Efficient Long Video Temporal Reasoning in Activities of Daily Living

score.rationale_zh: 创新性高(23/30)：提出 Propose-then-Verify 混合范式与 ACE 候选证据模块，先用轻量模块产生答案-证据假设，仅在必要时调用昂贵 VLM 做定向验证；实验指标好(12/15)：在 OTB 上超过最强 baseline 7.3%，并在 Charades-STA 上达到 SOTA；实验质量(12/15)：新建 OpenTSUBench 开放式基准并做消融；方法效率满分(10/10)：VLM 调用减少 75%、推理成本降低 93%，这是该工作的核心卖点；泛化性(4/5)：无需显式时序定位训练即具竞争力；相关性(19/25)：长视频内容理解与大规模视频内容治理/审核的效率诉求高度契合。综合 80 分，达到复现门槛。

zh.method_overview: TimeProVe 面向小时级未剪辑长视频问答(LVQA)，提出'先提议、后验证'的高效混合框架。核心是 Action-based Candidate Evidence (ACE) 模块：先用轻量 LLM/动作定位模块把视频中时序定位到的动作转化为'查询条件下的候选答案+支撑证据时间窗'，形成答案-证据假设；随后只对这些少量候选片段调用昂贵的大 VLM 做定向验证，从而把推理复杂度与原始视频时长解耦。论文还提出开放式基准 OpenTSUBench(OTB)，评测真实日常活动(ADL)场景下的时序定位推理。
zh.innovation: 区别于'看全片'的密集 VLM 处理(成本随时长线性增长)和纯字幕/caption 稀疏推理(易漏掉时序定位与动作细节)，TimeProVe 用廉价模块生成候选、再用昂贵模型定向验证，兼顾精度与成本。ACE 把'动作定位'显式转化为可验证的答案-证据对，使长视频推理可扩展；且无需显式时序定位训练即具竞争力，创新点合理可行。
zh.key_metrics: 在 OpenTSUBench(OTB) 上比最强 baseline 高 7.3%，同时 VLM 调用减少 75%、推理成本降低 93%；在 Charades-STA 上无需显式定位训练即有竞争力，配合 grounding VLM 时达到 SOTA。

en.method_overview: TimeProVe targets hours-long untrimmed Long Video Question Answering (LVQA) with a cost-efficient propose-then-verify framework. Its core Action-based Candidate Evidence (ACE) module first uses lightweight LLM/action-localization to convert temporally localized actions into query-conditioned candidate answers plus supporting evidence windows (answer-evidence hypotheses); an expensive large VLM is then invoked only for targeted verification of these few candidates, decoupling reasoning complexity from raw video duration. The paper also introduces OpenTSUBench (OTB), an open-ended benchmark for temporally grounded reasoning in real-world Activities of Daily Living (ADL).
en.innovation: Unlike dense 'watch-it-all' VLM processing (cost grows with duration) or caption-only sparse reasoning (misses temporally localized motion evidence), TimeProVe proposes cheap candidates then verifies them with the expensive model only when needed, balancing accuracy and cost. ACE explicitly turns action localization into verifiable answer-evidence pairs, making long-video reasoning scalable, and stays competitive without explicit grounding training.
en.key_metrics: +7.3% over the strongest baseline on OpenTSUBench (OTB), with 75% fewer VLM calls and 93% lower inference cost; competitive on Charades-STA without explicit grounding training, and SOTA when enhanced with grounding VLMs.

title: NEST: Narrative Event Structures in Time for Long Video Understanding

score.rationale_zh: 创新性(22/30)：把长视频理解从'大海捞针检索'升级为'叙事事件结构'理解，定义 ETD/EL/EAE/ERE 四类任务，超越多选题范式；实验指标(9/15)：作为基准其 baseline 极低(ETD<8%、EL<6%、EAE<11%)，意在暴露难度而非刷 SOTA；实验质量(13/15)：1005 部完整电影(均长98分钟)、~102 事件/片、视觉+对白+音频三模态标注，对比表详尽；效率(5/10)不适用；泛化(4/5)规模大；相关性(17/25)：达人/创作者长视频内容理解相关。代码与 checkpoint 已开源，无需复现。

zh.method_overview: NEST 是面向完整长电影的'叙事事件结构'理解数据集与基准。包含 1005 部完整电影(平均约 98 分钟)，每部标注约 102 个多模态叙事事件，标注 grounding 于视觉、对白与音频，并通过时序顺序、层级组合、长程依赖等关系把事件连接成叙事结构。设立四个任务：事件触发检测(ETD)、事件定位(EL)、事件论元抽取(EAE)、事件关系抽取(ERE)，并给出基线。
zh.innovation: 现有长视频基准多停留在'大海捞针'式检索或带选择偏置的多选题，无法评测低层动作如何组成事件、事件如何跨时间互动、叙事如何推进。NEST 以全片为单位、要求模型把早期伏笔与后期结果跨长间隔关联，填补了叙事级理解评测空白。
zh.key_metrics: 基准极具挑战：grounded 事件发现的 ETD<8%、EL<6%、EAE<11%；相对而言给定事件后的关系抽取 ERE 更可解，zero-shot 35.45% F1、微调后 44.42% F1。数据总时长 1639.3 小时。

en.method_overview: NEST is a dataset and benchmark for narrative event structure understanding over full-length movies: 1005 films (avg ~98 min), each annotated with ~102 multimodal narrative events grounded in visual content, dialogue, and audio, and linked by relations capturing temporal ordering, hierarchical composition, and long-range dependencies. It defines four tasks—Event Trigger Detection (ETD), Event Localization (EL), Event Argument Extraction (EAE), and Event Relation Extraction (ERE)—with baselines.
en.innovation: Existing long-video benchmarks emphasize needle-in-a-haystack retrieval or biased multiple-choice, failing to assess how low-level actions form events, how events interact over time, and how narratives progress. NEST works at the full-movie level and requires linking early setups to later payoffs across long gaps, filling the narrative-level evaluation gap.
en.key_metrics: Highly challenging for grounded discovery: ETD <8%, EL <6%, EAE <11%; relation extraction (ERE) is more tractable once events are given, reaching 35.45% F1 zero-shot and 44.42% F1 after fine-tuning. Total duration 1639.3 hours.

title: Connect the Dots: Training LLMs for Long-Lifecycle Agents with Cross-Domain Generalization Via Reinforcement Learning

score.rationale_zh: 创新性高(24/30)：提出'Connect the Dots(CoD)'元能力——长周期智能体在持续探索中不断从自身经验学习并自更新上下文，配套端到端 RL(长 rollout 交替 solve-task 与 update-context)与细粒度信用分配 GRPO 变体；实验指标(10/15)为 proof-of-concept、展示 OOD 泛化但缺标准 SOTA 表；质量(12/15)；效率(6/10)；泛化满分(5/5)是其核心主张；相关性(13/25)：Agent 弱相关。代码已开源(Trinity-RFT)，无需复现。

zh.method_overview: CoD 提出训练 LLM 获得'串联线索(Connect the Dots)'的元能力：智能体部署后会连续解决一长串任务，同时持续探索环境、从自身经验学习并迭代自更新对环境的上下文，从而在后续任务上越做越好。框架包含：(1) 端到端 RL 的算法与基础设施，支持交替'解题(solve-task)'与'更新上下文(update-context)'的长 rollout 序列；(2) 为激发该元能力定制的任务与环境，以及评测协议；并给出带细粒度信用分配的 GRPO 风格 RL 实现。
zh.innovation: 不同于按任务独立训练或仅靠固定上下文，CoD 把'随经验自更新上下文'本身作为可被 RL 优化的目标，强调训练-评测都针对元能力(而非领域特定能力)，并验证了域内、跨域乃至到 Ralph-loop 设置的分布外泛化。
zh.key_metrics: 概念验证实验证明端到端 RL 在 CoD 设定下有效，并展示了在训练域内、跨域以及向 Ralph-loop 迁移的 OOD 泛化潜力；开源实现于 Trinity-RFT。

en.method_overview: CoD trains LLMs for a meta-capability called 'Connect the Dots': a deployed agent solves a long sequence of tasks while continuously exploring, learning from its own experience, and iteratively self-updating its context about the environment, thereby improving on future tasks. It contributes (1) algorithms and infrastructure for end-to-end RL over long rollouts that interleave solve-task and update-context episodes, and (2) tasks/environments and evaluation that elicit and measure this meta-capability, with a GRPO-style RL algorithm featuring fine-grained credit assignment.
en.innovation: Rather than per-task RL or fixed context, CoD makes experience-driven self-updating of context itself an RL-optimizable objective, targeting the meta-capability during both training and evaluation, and validates out-of-distribution generalization within domains, across domains, and to Ralph-loop settings.
en.key_metrics: Proof-of-concept results validate end-to-end RL in the CoD setting and demonstrate OOD generalization within training domains, across domains, and from CoD to Ralph-loop settings; implementation released in Trinity-RFT.

title: Multi-Agent Transactive Memory

score.rationale_zh: 创新性(21/30)：把 RAG 从'检索人类文档'扩展到'检索智能体生成的轨迹'，构建群体级的存取共享库(transactive memory)，形成生产者-消费者市场；实验指标(10/15)：在 ALFWorld/WebArena 上提升任务成功率并减少交互步数；质量(12/15)：单阶段检索+LTR 重排两套方案、规模增长分析；效率(7/10)：复用轨迹降低重复探索成本；泛化(4/5)；相关性(14/25)：Agent/RAG 弱相关。代码已开源，无需复现。

zh.method_overview: MATM(多智能体交互记忆)面向去中心化、异构的智能体群体，提出群体级的'轨迹存取共享'框架：生产者智能体把任务执行中产生的交互轨迹(动作-观测序列等程序性知识)贡献到共享库，消费者智能体检索这些轨迹来提升自身任务效果与效率。聚焦交互式环境(ALFWorld、WebArena)，轨迹长且程序性结构丰富。还引入基于 Learning-to-Rank 的轨迹重排阶段以提升检索质量。
zh.innovation: 现有经验复用大多局限于'生产者本人'，新实例化的智能体被迫重复发现已有解法。MATM 借鉴'交互记忆(transactive memory)'概念，让异构智能体无需协调或联合训练即可共享并复用彼此经验，并支持个性化、生产者可信度建模、随群体演化更新检索器等高级功能。
zh.key_metrics: 在 ALFWorld 与 WebArena 上，检索共享轨迹既提升下游任务成功率，又减少交互步数；LTR 重排进一步提升检索质量与步数效率；收益对弱/强智能体均成立，并随库规模增长持续改善。

en.method_overview: MATM (Multi-Agent Transactive Memory) provides population-level storage and retrieval of agent-generated trajectories for decentralized, heterogeneous agent populations: producer agents contribute interaction trajectories (action-observation procedural knowledge) to a shared repository, and consumer agents retrieve them to improve task effectiveness and efficiency. It focuses on interactive environments (ALFWorld, WebArena) where trajectories are long and procedurally rich, and adds a Learning-to-Rank reranking stage for retrieval quality.
en.innovation: Existing experience reuse is largely limited to the original producer, forcing newly instantiated agents to rediscover solutions. Drawing on transactive memory, MATM lets heterogeneous agents share and reuse each other's experience without coordination or joint training, and enables personalization, producer trust modeling, and periodic retriever updates as the population evolves.
en.key_metrics: On ALFWorld and WebArena, retrieving shared trajectories improves downstream task success and reduces interaction steps; LTR reranking further improves retrieval quality and step efficiency; benefits hold for weaker and stronger agents and grow as the repository scales.

title: StylisticBias: A Few Human Visual Cues Drive Most Social Biases in MLLMs

score.rationale_zh: 创新性(18/30)：受控的'单属性变化、身份固定'基准设计，干净分离外观效应与身份差异；实验指标(9/15)：发现约15个属性解释近80%偏见变化；质量(12/15)：500张基脸×约50单属性变体共约25K图，6个MLLM、25个二元社会判断场景；效率(5/10)不适用；泛化(4/5)；相关性(16/25)：与'达人/创作者形象判断的公平性治理'、电商带货人设/穿搭判断相关。代码与数据集已开源，无需复现。

zh.method_overview: StylisticBias 是评测 MLLM 属性级社会偏见的受控基准。生成 500 张写实基础人脸，每张产生约 50 个'单属性变体'(共约 25K 图)，在保持身份不变的前提下每次只改变一个视觉属性(年龄、体型、穿搭风格等)，从而度量特定线索如何改变模型判断。在 6 个 MLLM、25 个二元社会判断场景上评测。
zh.innovation: 以往研究常对比不同个体，难以分离'外观效应'与'身份差异'。本工作通过'固定身份+单属性扰动'实现干净的归因，揭示偏见集中在少数视觉线索上，为细粒度偏见评测提供可控工具。
zh.key_metrics: 年龄与体型主导身份级效应，穿搭风格等视觉线索带来最大的属性级偏移；约 15 个属性解释近 80% 的总变化；偏见在与外观语义对齐的判断(社会经济地位、风格相关)上最强。

en.method_overview: StylisticBias is a controlled benchmark for attribute-level social bias in MLLMs. It generates 500 photorealistic base faces and ~50 single-attribute variations each (~25K images), keeping identity fixed while changing one visual attribute at a time (age, body type, fashion style, etc.) to measure how specific cues shift model judgments, evaluated across 6 MLLMs and 25 binary social judgment scenarios.
en.innovation: Prior work compares different individuals, conflating appearance effects with identity differences. By fixing identity and perturbing single attributes, StylisticBias enables clean attribution and shows bias is concentrated in a small set of visual cues, offering a controllable instrument for fine-grained bias evaluation.
en.key_metrics: Age and body type dominate identity-level effects, while fashion style and other cues drive the largest attribute-level shifts; ~15 attributes account for nearly 80% of total variation; sensitivity is strongest for appearance-aligned judgments (socioeconomic, style-related).

title: NAMESAKES: Probing Identity Memorization in Text-to-Image Models

score.rationale_zh: 创新性(20/30)：提出完全黑盒的行为探测，无需参考照片/训练数据/白盒访问即可区分'记忆 vs 虚构'的人脸生成；实验指标(9/15)：能显著预测身份记忆并区分被记忆/未识别的名字；质量(11/15)：构建 1269 个名字-人脸的 NAMESAKES 数据集，覆盖不同知名度并含扰动名；效率(5/10)；泛化(4/5)跨模型族；相关性(14/25)：与创作者/达人肖像隐私治理、深伪风险相关。属数据集+探测方法，本日无需复现。

zh.method_overview: NAMESAKES 研究文生图(T2I)模型对真实人物的'身份记忆'问题：当以名字为提示时，模型可能生成可辨识的真人肖像，带来隐私风险。论文提出完全黑盒的行为探测方法，无需参考照片、训练数据或模型内部访问，即可区分生成人脸是'被记忆'还是'被虚构'。并构建 NAMESAKES 数据集(1269 个名字-人脸)用于基准评测。
zh.innovation: 以往判断是否记忆需要真值照片、训练数据或白盒访问，适用性受限。本方法仅靠模型对'名字/扰动名'的黑盒行为差异即可推断记忆，且数据集覆盖从高知名度到低知名度、含扰动名对照，使评测更严谨。
zh.key_metrics: 在多款 SOTA T2I 模型上，该探测能显著预测身份记忆并把'被记忆'与'未识别'的名字分离开，并给出不同模型族之间差异的洞见;数据集含 1269 个名字-人脸对。

en.method_overview: NAMESAKES studies identity memorization in text-to-image (T2I) models: prompting with a person's name can yield recognizable likenesses, raising privacy concerns. It introduces a fully black-box behavioral probe that distinguishes memorized vs. fabricated faces without reference photos, training-data access, or model internals, and builds the NAMESAKES dataset (1,269 name-face pairs) for benchmarking.
en.innovation: Distinguishing memorization previously required ground-truth photos, training data, or white-box access, limiting applicability. This probe infers memorization purely from black-box behavioral differences across names and perturbed names, with a dataset spanning fame levels and perturbed-name controls for rigorous evaluation.
en.key_metrics: Across state-of-the-art T2I models, the probe substantially predicts identity memorization and separates memorized from unrecognized names, with insights into differences across model families; dataset contains 1,269 name-face pairs.

title: Structuring and Tokenizing Distributed User Interest Context for Generative Recommendation

score.rationale_zh: 创新性(23/30)：首次将全局图协同参与信号作为 item tokenization 的显式监督，去除启发式依赖并解决 GNN 规模化问题，打通过去割裂的图建模与分词两个模块；指标(12/15)：Meta 多产品面在线 A/B+公开基准双重验证；实验质量(12/15)：含消融实验；效率(7/10)：图可扩展但有额外图构建开销；泛化满分(5/5)：跨 Meta 多产品面部署；相关性(22/25)：工业级电商推荐，直接与达人/商品推荐场景对齐。总分 81，需复现。

zh.method_overview: G2Rec 提出统一框架，将全局图协同参与建模（holistic co-engagement graph，可扩展至工业级，非局部 GNN）与有监督语义分词（用图推断的用户兴趣原型作为分词软标签）融合于端到端生成式序列推荐骨干之上。具体：先从全局用户-物品交互图推断物品的兴趣原型分配（无需真实标注），再将其作为 RQ-VAE 风格分词器的监督信号（交叉熵损失），最后在离散 token 序列上用自回归 Transformer 预测下一物品 token。总损失 L = L_rec + λ·L_tok。已在 Meta 多个产品面在线部署验证。
zh.innovation: 与 TIGER/ActionPiece（启发式分词）和 CoFiRec/NGCF（局部 GNN）相比：(1) 图模块用全局协同参与而非 GNN 邻域聚合，规避工业规模下的 O(n²) 问题；(2) 分词器首次获得图信号驱动的显式监督，而非无监督 k-means；(3) 两模块统一端到端优化，减少优化目标不一致。
zh.key_metrics: Meta 内部多产品面在线 A/B 测试全面超越 baseline；公开基准（多个序列推荐标准数据集）NDCG@10/HR@10 优于 TIGER、ActionPiece、CoFiRec 等 SOTA。

en.method_overview: G2Rec unifies holistic graph-based co-engagement modeling (scalable, not local GNN) with supervised semantic tokenization, using graph-inferred user interest prototypes as soft supervision labels for an RQ-VAE-style tokenizer, all built on an autoregressive Transformer recommender backbone. Loss: L = L_rec + λ·L_tok. Deployed online at Meta across multiple product surfaces.
en.innovation: vs. TIGER/ActionPiece (heuristic tokenization) and CoFiRec/NGCF (local GNN): (1) holistic co-engagement avoids O(n²) GNN at industrial scale; (2) first tokenizer with explicit graph-signal supervision instead of unsupervised k-means; (3) end-to-end joint optimization of graph + tokenization + recommendation.
en.key_metrics: Online A/B at Meta across product surfaces shows consistent gains; public benchmarks (multiple standard sequential rec datasets) outperform TIGER, ActionPiece, CoFiRec on NDCG@10/HR@10.

title: ELVA: Exploring Ranking-Driven Universal Multimodal Retrieval

score.rationale_zh: 创新性(21/30)：用 rule-based RL 排序 negative 以解决对比学习中的粒度盲区，思路新颖；指标(10/15)：在 UMR 基准上相较对比学习 baseline 有提升；质量(10/15)：需更多实验细节；效率(7/10)：训练有 RL 额外开销，推理无；泛化(3/5)：针对 UMR 但未见深度跨域分析；相关性(17/25)：多模态检索可用于电商搜索，但未直接针对电商。总分 68，不需复现。

zh.method_overview: ELVA 针对通用多模态检索（UMR）中对比学习的'粒度盲区'（grain blindness）问题，提出基于规则的 RL 框架：将 batch 内 negatives 按与 positive 的余弦相似度排序，定义规则奖励，让模型分别从粗粒度（完全无关 negative）和细粒度（语义相近 hard negative）中获取不同的区分训练信号，缓解标准 InfoNCE 把所有 negative 等价对待的缺陷。
zh.innovation: 首次用 RL 排序机制在 UMR 对比学习中显式区分 hard/soft negatives，直接针对'粒度盲区'这一根本问题；推理期与标准检索无额外开销，仅训练期增加 RL 更新步骤。
zh.key_metrics: 在标准 UMR 基准（如 M-BEIR）上相较对比学习 baseline 有提升（具体数值见论文）。

en.method_overview: ELVA addresses 'grain blindness' in contrastive learning for Universal Multimodal Retrieval (UMR): negatives are ranked by cosine similarity to the positive, and a rule-based RL reward trains the model to learn different granularity information from each negative level, rather than treating all negatives as binary positives/negatives under InfoNCE.
en.innovation: First to use RL-driven negative ranking in UMR contrastive training to explicitly target grain blindness; no inference overhead — only training-time RL update steps added.
en.key_metrics: Outperforms contrastive learning baselines on standard UMR benchmarks (M-BEIR etc.; see paper for exact numbers).
